raw_text: A very convenient app, with products available just at your fingertips. The delivery is very fast, the product quality and packaging are very good. Documents are also delivered in a very confidential manner in very good condition. Highly recommend!!!!

Blinkit seriously needs to improve its logistics and customer support. My orders have been delivered to the wrong address multiple times, yet customer executives simply trust the delivery partner’s word without properly verifying with the customer. Instead of resolving the issue, they just ask customers to “check again.” This is frustrating and disappointing for a service that promises convenience and reliability.

Wanted to give rating in minus...They delivered rotten fruit and I have raised concern with providing image. still there is no resolution for that and they said their record says fruit was good. I gave them clear image that fruit was completely rotten. They dont take ownership of what they give. They are keeping much higher value of fruits and vegetables but quality is not that much good..I really doubt now whether organic fruits/vegetables are really organic or not which they are selling!

I ordered boAt Airdopes, and they have a severe defect: the volume blasts to 100% every single time they connect to my phone or laptop. This is not a 'feature'—it is a literal hearing hazard that can cause permanent ear damage. I requested a replacement on Day 2, well within Blinkit’s '7-day replacement policy,' but they refused to help. They are gaslighting customers by calling a dangerous audio spike a 'feature' to avoid honoring their own warranty. 7-day replacement policy is a lie.

Very nice app, But extra prices are a little much otherwise it's good also delivery boys never get address we will always have to go out and reach the delivery boys, BLINKIT can advise them to direct reach to the pinned location on Google Map,B.t.w. all well.

Super fast and reliable! Blinkit is my absolute go-to app for daily essentials. Delivering grocery items within 10-15 minutes is just incredible. The app interface is smooth, and the packaging is always neat. Highly recommended!

I'm very satisfied with Blinkit. The delivery is consistently fast, the packaging is eco-friendly and well-packed, and my orders always arrive in good condition. Overall, I'm really happy with the service and the convenience it offers. Keep up the great work!

The laptop table you delivered had three dead baby rats inside the box along with the table. The entire room now smells very bad. This is a serious issue affecting the customer’s health. It seems like you did not properly check the product and delivered it directly from your stock. This has been a very poor experience with your service this time.

Some product have high price compare to other online murchants. My first order I delivered fast and nicely,thanks for the same. when you order milk please check the use by date some time they send outdated or use by date milk so you must have to consume without your need.you can't store for next day.

I've been using this app for a long time, it's been a great experience, it has very quick deliveries +it has variety of products available as well as they have imported premium products which is amazing, must try!

In product listings (Every Catagory ), the main screen shows blank/white boxes instead of product images. Images only appear after opening product details. Please fix this so customers can view products directly in the list . Also, add a “Near Expiry Deals” section for dairy, food, and other perishables with heavy discounts and clear expiry date/time information. This can reduce waste and increase sales. Please promote Super Daily Offers more prominently with banners and notifications.

the experience is very bad due to lot of fees it described the overall experience because customer want products of their mrp rate but due to lot of fees the product became very expensive . and also whenever we made online payment the order did not receive by the customer and they also not done anything for us they are fooling us and they are Snatching our money

i ordered a product i.e streax serum which was too bad ...there is no button to press...now how will I use it? and when I applied for help they r not even exchanging it they r saying that only return option is available and refund but they r not ready to refund... otherwise remaining items were quite good ..their packaging and product quality is amazing but really disappointed with my 1st order ....not expected from this site...i will prefer to buy from some offline store

I have experienced worst costomer support ever . before they use to excelate an issue by an agent.but now they use to tell Put a Mail to blinkit. which is automated reply .giveing silly reason. I have missing my iterms
Well maintains the timing. Quantity and quality are accurate. vegetables and fruits are fresh, all the time i have bought. Even it's rainy or late night, you're all available, Kudos to that 👍🏻😊.

I needed to walk 500 meters to get my parcel even after putting correct address and I am told to enter correct location and the delivery man told address is correct but location is wrong and there is no other option to correct or enter location this happened 2 more times before and the delivery man don't know most landmark and trying to put blame on others

As soon as you fond a fault in their product and opt for a replacement or refund, they stop giving the option of COD Blinkit disappointed again. Delivered yesterday's milk on which use by date is today. When asked for replacement, they asked for photos and said the packet is sealed and I can use it till evening.

To make it worse, there is no accessible customer care to raise this issue. The in-app support is unresponsive and I have no way to report this. This is a serious lapse in both product quality and customer service. I request an immediate full refund and expect Blinkit to take corrective action.

I had written a review on 22nd April and again ur store messed up big time.it just doesn't care. Since a couple of months it's happening on a reg basis and for senior handicapped citizens it's draining. today 30th..i had multiple orders.. one store did such a fine job but the regular one messed up BIG TIME.. don't do that guys.. it's not a question of refunds or promo codes.. it's the time and energy.. most of my morning was wasted and I am exhausted.. I'm not young anymore so I've uninstalled

dirty and very bad . all products are always very dirty. dont know whether their store rooms are dustbin or not. each and every products are very dirty. am not a new user. using vlinkit more that 4 years. several times I have raised the problem. but all blink it cares about money and trash service to the customers. decided to shif another app. never recomended.
